LAW AND MOTION, 302, AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE, SUBMITTED ON SEP-23-2019 BY ETHAN P. SCHULMAN. MATTER ARGUED AND SUBMITTED. AS TO PETITIONER KHURRAN DURRANI'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE, THE COURT INVITES PETITIONER'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER/STATEMENT OF DECISION THAT PRESENTS A COUNTERPOINT TO THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. THE DOCUMENT IS TO BE E-MAILED BY 9/23/19 TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG WITH THE OPPOSING SIDE COPIED. THE COURT WILL DEEM THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE UNDER SUBMISSION ON 9/23/19 OR EARLIER IF PETITIONER'S DOCUMENT IS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT EARLIER. JUDGE: ETHAN P. calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Attys. MITCHELL J. GREEN, ESQ. of Nossaman LLP (Tel: 415-398-3600) and IVAN WEINBERG, ESQ. of Weinberg Hoffman, LLP (Tel: 415-461-9666) appearing for petitioner Khurran Durrani;
Deputy Attorney General GREG W. CHAMBERS of Office of the Attorney General of the State of California (Tel: 415-510-3382) appearing for Respondent Medical Board of California.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER KHURRAN DURRANI'S Petition for Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Matter argued and submitted. As to PETITIONER KHURRAN DURRANI'S Petition for Writ Of Administrative Mandate, the Court invites petitioner's counsel to submit a proposed order/statement of decision that presents a counterpoint to the Court's tentative ruling. The document is to be e-mailed by 9/23/19 to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with the opposing side copied. The Court will deem the petition for writ of administrative mandate under submission on 9/23/19 or earlier if petitioner's document is submitted to the Court earlier.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER KHURRAN DURRANI'S Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is off calendar. Petitioner did not provide the court with the administrative record.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
